creator: demelier.david@gmail.com
text:
Looks like the net/luasocket-51 slave port is broken? Why it is installed as 5.2 as lua51-mpd explicitly depend on net/luasocket-51 and not net/luasocket?

I don't do Lua anymore so I have no idea if lua-mpd works on Lua 5.2, if it's the case maybe we could use USES=lua and depend on net/luasocket.
